---
label: "Failover & Circuit Breakers"
icon: "🛡️"
---

## Failover & Circuit Breakers

LLM providers experience outages and degraded performance. A production gateway needs **<JargonTip term="circuit breaker">circuit breakers</JargonTip>** to detect unhealthy providers, **automatic failover** to alternatives, and **graceful degradation** when all providers struggle.

  <CodeBlock b64="" />
  <Quiz question="A circuit breaker is in HALF_OPEN state. What does this mean?" options={["Partially broken","Testing whether the failed provider has recovered by allowing limited test requests","Half of requests go through","Provider at 50% capacity"]} correctIndex={1} explanation="HALF_OPEN is the recovery testing state. After the recovery timeout, the circuit allows limited test requests. If they succeed, it returns to CLOSED (normal). If they fail, it goes back to OPEN."/>
